reviews.review_description: But I liked it and found it interesting alot, and I dont like Disney.

Take a trip into the DISNEY past! Experience a faithful reproduction of an installation from the 1964-1965 World’s Fair in New York, the Tower of the Four Winds. See and hear about how it was designed by Disney legend, Rolly Crump, and then, apparently, torn down and thrown into the ocean. 
Yeah. The 1960's, right? 
But for a free experience, it's pretty cool, and I enjoyed it. Check out my gameplay at the link below. 
https://youtu.be/xmn3cNjiB04
Thanks for liking, subscribing, and watching StoneToaster Gaming!
